executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON index file containing precomputed keywords and summaries for other files in the project; its content appears truncated in the provided snippet.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting streaming responses and returning errors on failure.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: This Edge Function proxies POST requests to a Railway backend service using the request's path suffix and an auth token from environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: This Edge Function proxies search requests to the Firecrawl API, returning structured results with title, URL, snippet, and domain extraction.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: This Edge Function returns a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via GET request, with CORS support.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: This Edge Function proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and returning the API response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies chat completion requests to OpenRouter API, handling POST method validation, API key retrieval, streaming response via SSE or JSON, and error responses.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Node.js script that injects a script into index.html to hide the login gate and show the root element when running in a Netlify deploy-preview context.

preferences.json.summary: Configuration file for a self-improving bot with settings for clarification prompts, planning rules and decomposition threshold, execution code style and linting, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: React component that implements a simple chat interface with message list, task list, input bar, toaster, and queuing of pending commands when the bot is busy.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: React component rendering a responsive header with repo and branch inputs, styled for mobile and desktop, displaying the bot title.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: A React component that renders an input field and send button with responsive styling based on window width, supporting Enter key submission.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: React component that renders a scrollable list of chat messages with distinct user and agent styles and auto-scrolls to the bottom using a ref.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: React component displaying a list of tasks with color-coded status indicators and responsive max-height for mobile devices.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A React component that shows a fixed-position toast notification at the bottom center with error/success border styling.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: A class that orchestrates self-improvement runs with hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, dependency ordering, and LLM-based planning within a 20-second timeout.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates all information gathered during an agentic run, storing file summaries, notes, and building a compact context string for the LLM prompt.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: agenticExecutor executes a single task using a read-before-write loop where the LLM may request additional files before emitting the final code, with skill blocks recognised directly.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores a codebase to plan a change by iteratively reading files and deciding on next actions until a plan is formed.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 5, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing the result as keywords.json.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: clarification.js generates clarifying questions with a timeout to help the autonomous coding agent understand the user's request before making changes.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi-agent plan creation that groups candidate files by directory, runs parallel exploration agents, and uses a coordinator to merge summaries into a cohesive plan.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files by matching goal keywords against a keyword index or fallback filename scan, scoring and returning top candidates.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners with ability to decompose complex goals into sub-goals by querying an LLM architect and returning a hierarchical plan.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides best match functionality using Levenshtein distance for fuzzy matching.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures manifest.json is available by loading from GitHub or building from source JavaScript files.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks from a task queue in parallel up to a configurable maximum concurrency, using file-locking to skip tasks that would modify files currently being changed by another concurrent task.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Provides functions to save and load the agent's working memory (goal, file summaries, notes, plan) to/from the repository under a .self-improve directory, scoped by a run ID to prevent overwrites during concurrent or nested runs.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Takes a goal and discovered context (from file scanning), sends it to an LLM to generate a structured JSON plan containing a milestone title, analysis, and up to four tasks, each specifying exact file paths and required changes.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on the repository with a self-improvement title derived from the goal and returns the resulting PR URL.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews each completed task by fetching the actual file content from the repository and prompting an LLM to verify if the implementation matches the task description, then updates the task status accordingly (pass or reopen).

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Provides functions to initialize and manage a task queue with status transitions (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and retrieval of pending or done tasks.

src/main.js.summary: Main entry point that initializes React app and sets up services including a SelfImprover agent using GitHub, LLM, and executor providers with workspace and provider store configurations.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Service to load and save a preferences.json file from/to a GitHub repository, providing default configurations for agent clarification, planning, execution, and review behaviors.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: API client that delegates lint and syntax checks to a serverless proxy endpoint, with fail‑open behavior on network errors to avoid blocking commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Provides static methods to interact with GitHub API for fetching file trees, loading file content, and committing multiple files in a single operation.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: A class to call language models via Netlify edge proxies with timeout, fast model override, and support for thinking mode and reasoning effort.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: A class to poll a Netlify deploy preview URL until it returns a healthy page or times out.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: A Zustand store with persistence for managing LLM provider settings like provider, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: A Zustand store with persistence for managing workspace settings like repository, branch, GitHub token, and remember keys flag.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: A utility to parse AI replies for special skill tags (update_editor and read_file) and extract their contents, modifying the reply accordingly.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: The ContextBuilder class provides static methods to identify required files based on a dependency manifest and build a context string for LLM prompts, including target files fully and related files with interface-only content, respecting a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: ManifestBuilder builds a dependency graph from JavaScript files by parsing exports and imports, resolving relative paths, and computing reverse dependencies (importedBy).

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: The testCodeSandbox function evaluates code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded service mocks, runs a SelfImprover instance's health check, and resolves with a boolean result or false on timeout.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: The stripComments function reduces code size by removing block comments, line comments, and blank lines to optimize prompts for LLMs.
